[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Jolene, Jolene, Jolene, Jolene[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm begging of you, please don't take my man[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Jolene, Jolene, Jolene, Jolene[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Please don't take him just because you can[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Your beauty is beyond compare[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
With flaming locks of auburn hair[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
With ivory skin and eyes of emerald green[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Your smile is like a breath of spring[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Your voice is soft like summer rain[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
And I cannot compete with you, Jolene[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
He talks about you in his sleep[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
There's nothing I can do to keep[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
From crying when he calls your name, Jolene[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
And I can easily understand[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
How you could easily take my man[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
But you don't know what he means to me, Jolene[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Jolene, Jolene, Jolene, Jolene[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm begging of you, please don't take my man[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Jolene, Jolene, Jolene, Jolene[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                    [ch]Am[/ch]
Please don't take him just because you can[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
You could have your choice of men[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
But I could never love again[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
He's the only one for me, Jolene[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
I had to have this talk with you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
My happiness depends on you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
And whatever you decide to do, Jolene[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Jolene, Jolene, Jolene, Jolene[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm begging of you, please don't take my man[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Jolene, Jolene, Jolene, Jolene[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                    [ch]Am[/ch]
Please don't take him even though you can[/tab]

#----------------------------------PLEASE NOTE---------------------------------#

#song. You may only use this file for private study, scholarship, or research. #

 <9305060019.AA26041@am.ucsc.edu>
To: jamesb@animal-farm.nevada.edu
From: indigo@cats.UCSC.EDU (Adam Schneider)
Subject: /Griffith.Nanci/TecumsehValley.crd

			TECUMSEH VALLEY

[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
		The name she gave was Caroline[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
		Daughter of a miner[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
		And her ways were free and it seemed to me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
		The sunshine walked beside her[/tab]

		She came from Spencer across the hill
		She said her Pa had sent her
		'Cause the coal was low and soon the snow
		Would turn the skies to winter

		She said she'd come to look for work
		She was not seeking favor
		For a dime a day and a place to stay
		She turned those hands to labor

		But the times were hard, Lord, and the jobs were few
		All through Tecumseh Valley
		She'd ask around, and a job she found
		Tendin' bar at Gypsy Sally's

		She saved enough to get back home
		And spring replaced the winter
		But her dreams were denied, her Pa had died
		The word come down from Spencer

		So she turned to whorin' out on the streets
		With all the lust inside her
		And it was many a man returned again
		To lay himself beside her

		They found her down beneath the stairs
		That led to Gypsy Sally's
		And in her hand when she died was a note that cried
		"Fare thee well, Tecumseh Valley".

		-instrumental verse-

		-repeat first verse-

[tab][Intro]
            Repeat from this point

[Chorus]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
Well, you only need the light when it's burning low[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
Only miss the sun when it starts to snow[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Only know you love her when you let her go[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
Only know you've been high when you're feeling low[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
Only hate the road when you're missin' home[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
Only know you love her when you let her go[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  And you let her go[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]F[/ch]
Staring at the bottom of your glass[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
Hoping one day you'll make a dream last[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
But dreams come slow and they go so fast[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
You see her when you close your eyes[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
Maybe one day you'll understand why[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Everything you touch surely dies[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]F[/ch]
Staring at the ceiling in the dark[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
Same old empty feeling in your heart[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause love comes slow and it goes so fast[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Well you see her when you fall asleep[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
But never to touch and never to keep[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
'Cause you loved her too much[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
And you dived too deep[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]

[ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]

[Chorus] (One Strum)
[tab]                         [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]

N.C.
Only know you've been high when you're feeling low

Only hate the road when you're missin' home

Only know you love her when you let her go

And you let her go

[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
I heard there was a secret chord[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
That David played and it pleased the Lord[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
But you don't really care for music, do you?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Well it goes like this the fourth, the fifth[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
The minor fall and the major lift[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
The baffled king composing hallelujah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelu-u-u-u-jah ....[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Well, your faith was strong but you needed proof[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
You saw her bathing on the roof[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Her beauty and the moonlight overthrew you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
She tied you to her kitchen chair[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
She broke your throne and she cut your hair[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]E7[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
And from your lips she drew the hallelujah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelu-u-u-u-jah ....[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Baby, I've been here before[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
I've seen this room and I've walked this floor, you know[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
I used to live alone before I knew you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
I've seen your flag on the marble arch[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
And love is not a victory march[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
It's a cold and it's a broken hallelujah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelu-u-u-u-jah ....[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
Well, there was a time when you let me know[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
What's really going on below[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
But now you never show that to me do you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
But remember when I moved in you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
And the holy dove was moving too[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
And every breath we drew was hallelujah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]  
Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelu-u-u-u-jah ....[/tab]

[Verse 5]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Well, maybe there's a God above[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
But all I've ever learned from love[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]    
Was how to shoot somebody who outdrew you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
And it's not a cry that you hear at night[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
It's not somebody who's seen the light[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
It's a cold and it's a broken hallelujah[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   
Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelu-u-u-u ....[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   
Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelu-u-u-u ....[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelu-u-u-u-u-u-u-u-u-u-u-u-u-u-u-u-ujah ....[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Halleluuuuuuujah[/tab]

Lady In Black - Uriah Heep

[Intro]
| [ch]Am[/ch] | % |

[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
She came to me one morning, one lonely Sunday morning[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Her long hair flowing in the midwinter wind[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
I know not how she found me for in darkness I was walking[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
And destruction lay around me from a fight I could not win[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]             | [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahah.. ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  |       [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]

| [ch]Am[/ch] | % | % |

[Verse 2]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
She asked me name my foe then, I said the need within some men[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]Am[/ch]
To fight and kill their brothers without thought of love or God[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
And I begged her give me horses to trample down my enemies[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
So eager was my passion to devour this waste of life[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]             | [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahah.. ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  |       [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
But she would not think of battle that reduces men to animals[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
So easy to begin and yet impossible to end[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
For she's the mother of our men who counselled me so wisely then[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
I feared to walk alone again and asked if she would stay[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]             | [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahah.. ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]   |      [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh, lady lend your hand outright and let me rest here at your side[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Have faith and trust in peace she said and filled my heart with life[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
There is no strength in numbers, have no such misconception[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
But when you need me be assured I won't be far away[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]             | [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahah.. ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  |       [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]

[Verse 5]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
Thus having spoke she turned away and though I found no words to say[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
I stood and watched until I saw her black coat disappear[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
My labour is no easier but now I know I'm not alone[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]Am[/ch]
I find new heart each time I think upon that windy day[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
And if one day she comes to you drink deeply from her words so wise[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Take courage from her as your prize and say hello from me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]             | [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahah.. ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  |       [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]

[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]             | [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahah.. ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  |       [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]

[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]             | [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahah.. ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  |       [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]

[Bridge]
N.C.
Ah...  ahah.. ahahah...  ahahah
Ah...  ahah.. ahahah...  ahahah

[Chorus]
